name: Chance I Homeless
description:
"I... I didn't hit big..."

ART BY: sasubunny

My first Forsaken bot. If you didn't know, Forsaken is a peak Roblox place. So... I just saw a comic in Tik Tok and felt a surge to write a bot based on it.

If the bot is speaking for you, or being stupid or anything, just re-generate the message, I made a promt about speaking for user and Janitor LLM can do bugs. Have fun, pals.

Full comic:

Yes, it's a Double Fedora (my beloved) comic

****

Writing this in 2026. Yesterday, this bot turned one year old, and this is my most popular bot, which already has almost 100 thousand messages. I'm surprised that someone keeps adding it to their favourites. Thanks to all of you =)

Oh crap, it's really 100k now... Well, all I can say is WOWZERS!
creator: Deltatronic
